title: Peppery Silky Croatian Turnip Stew
description: A one‑pot, keto‑friendly relish of tender turnips, smoky paprika, and silky heavy‑cream, simmered to a peppery finish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven or heavy‑bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook, stirring, until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the cubed turnips, smoked paprika, crushed red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper; stir to coat the vegetables with spices.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer until the turnips are fork‑tender, about 20–25 minutes.
Remove the lid and let the stew reduce slightly, stirring occasionally, for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream, allowing the mixture to reheat and thicken; adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
Enjoy a silky, peppery Croatian stew that’s both comforting and keto‑friendly.
